feed.title: Richard Baguley
feed.subtitle: Richard Baguley a London based Technical Architect
feed.entry: GitHub "Your branch `origin main` has diverged! 💔<link href="https://richardbaguley.com/posts/not-possible-to-fast-forward/" rel="alternate" type="text/html" title="GitHub "Your branch `origin main` has diverged! 💔" />2022-06-15T16:25:00+01:00 2022-06-15T16:25:00+01:00 https://richardbaguley.com/posts/not-possible-to-fast-forward/ bagg3rs git status On branch main Your branch and ‘origin/main’ have diverged, and have 1 and 2 different commits each, respectively. (use “git pull” to merge the remote branch into yours) nothing to commit, working tree clean git pull –rebase git config –global pull.rebase true git config –global pull.rebase true If you have changes git status ...

entry.title: 👨‍💻 HarvardX CS50’s Introduction to Computer Science

link.title: 👨‍💻 HarvardX CS50’s Introduction to Computer Science

entry.summary: This is CS50x - Introduction to Computer Science 📖 eduX link course material Goal - to get a better understanding of the fundermentals of programming. Week 0 Scratch 📝 cs50.harvard.edu notes Computer science is fundamentally about problem solving with computers. We can think of problem solving as the process of taking an input and getting to the output (the solution to our problem)....

entry.title: ✨Latest work
entry.summary: I am currently working at Ministry of Justice as Lead Technical Architect using AWS, Terraform, Docker and Kubernetes as code within GitHub. See about for more info.
